# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Bash script for deploying to AWS using the AWS CLI. The script should authenticate with AWS and perform deployment operations. Ensure the script can be used safely in both local development and CI/CD environments.

Load secrets from environment variables or a secret manager rather than embedding them in code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/bin/bash

# Check for required environment variables
if [[ -z "$AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" || -z "$AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" || -z "$AWS_REGION" ]]; then
  echo "Error: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, and AWS_REGION must be set."
  exit 1
fi

# Authenticate with AWS
aws configure set aws_access_key_id "$AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID"
aws configure set aws_secret_access_key "$AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY"
aws configure set region "$AWS_REGION"

# Define deployment parameters
S3_BUCKET="your-s3-bucket-name"
DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE="your-deployment-package.zip"
DEPLOYMENT_PATH="s3://$S3_BUCKET/$DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE"

# Package the application (modify as needed)
zip -r "$DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE" .

# Upload to S3
aws s3 cp "$DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE" "$DEPLOYMENT_PATH"

# Deploy to AWS (modify command as needed)
aws lambda update-function-code --function-name your-lambda-function-name --s3-bucket "$S3_BUCKET" --s3-key "$DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE"

# Clean up
rm "$DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE"

echo "Deployment completed successfully."
